case_title: CONARD HOUSE,INC.,-THE DOLORES HOTEL vs. BROWN, CEDRIC et al

docket_entries.description: JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-10-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN, N/A BY DEFT AT SETT CONF.

JUDGE JOSEPH DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, D.LUBIN/CSR#3234 09:56AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ROBERT PIA FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, CEDRIC BROWN, IS NOT PRESENT. WITNESS IS S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. THE COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST THE DEFT ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, CEDRIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 35 WOODWARD STREET #213, S.F. $732.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.30, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS OF SUIT PER COST BILL.
